summary: Graph hide-unrelated mode now supports trail/path browsing with visited node labels and path edge emphasis.

behavior.node_click: append node to trail and set it as active node
behavior.hide_unrelated: show visited trail nodes plus active node one-hop neighbors
behavior.labels: visited trail nodes and selected/hovered nodes keep labels visible
behavior.full_graph: Load full graph disables hidden mode and resets the trail to the loaded center

validation: npx esbuild web/review_workbench/app.jsx web/review_workbench/components.jsx web/review_workbench/workbench.jsx web/review_workbench/graph.jsx web/review_workbench/screens.jsx web/review_workbench/reasoning.jsx --bundle --outdir=/tmp/aletheia-task261-esbuild --format=iife --log-level=warning
